# hrobot_rdns (Data Source)

Look up the reverse DNS (PTR) entry for an IP address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_rdns" "example" {
  ip = "203.0.113.1"
}

output "ptr" {
  value = data.hrobot_rdns.example.ptr
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address to look up.

### Read-Only

- `ptr` (String) The PTR record (reverse DNS name).
